name: Cors Caron NNR (Tregaron Bog)
highlights: Britain's finest raised bog with red kite feeding, otters and hen harrier in winter.
points_of_interest: Former Manchester & Milford railway; boardwalk viewing tower
viewpoints: Viewing tower across bog towards Cambrian Mountains
parking_start: Cors Caron NNR car park (free, off B4343)
food_drink_nearby: Y Talbot Tregaron (renowned gastropub); Caffi Alpacas
hazards_notes: Dogs must be on short lead April–July for ground-nesting birds
